PostToolUse.name: model-security-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Remind about access rules and sudo() when a Python model file is created or modified

hooks.message:
[odoo-security] Model file changed. Verify access rules exist in ir.model.access.csv and sudo() calls are justified.
Run /odoo-security --layer=access to audit.

PostToolUse.name: controller-security-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Remind about route authentication and CSRF when a controller file is created or modified

hooks.message:
[odoo-security] Controller file changed. Verify @http.route() has explicit auth= and csrf protection.
Run /odoo-security --layer=routes to audit.

PostToolUse.name: access-csv-changed
PostToolUse.description: Remind to validate access CSV completeness after any change to ir.model.access.csv

hooks.message:
[odoo-security] Access CSV modified. Verify model_id:id format (model_ prefix, dots to underscores) and group references.
Run /odoo-security --layer=access to validate.

PostToolUse.name: wizard-security-reminder
PostToolUse.description: Remind about TransientModel access rules when a wizard file is created or modified

hooks.message:
[odoo-security] Wizard file changed. TransientModel requires ir.model.access.csv entry with perm_create=1, perm_unlink=1.
Run /odoo-security --layer=access to verify.

PostToolUse.name: manifest-security-check
PostToolUse.description: Remind about security file ordering in manifest when __manifest__.py is modified

hooks.message: [odoo-security] Manifest changed. Verify security file order in data: groups XML first, then ir.model.access.csv, then rules XML.
